Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default And To Sever The Case From Brayton Trial Group 330, With Proof Of Service; Memo Of P&A Filed In Support; Declaration Of Paul Lannus Filed In Support
Off Calendar Sep-20-2005 Text Ruling

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Apportionment Proceeding And For An Order To Distribute Settlement Funds;
Off Calendar Jun-09-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion for Apportionment of Settlement Funds hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Dave Davenport.
Monique Morales, Esq. for Petitioners: Colette Weiss, present; Mark Weiss, present; and Michael Weiss, did not appear.
The Court having reviewed the moving papers, considered the evidence, and testimony, grants the Order as follows:
Attorneys' Fees and Costs $1,147.30
Balance of $158,973.68 to be distributed as follows: Estate of Raymond Weiss 10%; Colette Weiss (for Loss of Consortium) 40%; Colettte Weiss (as Wrongful Death Heir) 50%; Mark Weiss 0% and Michael 0%. See scanned doc. for details.
Order signed in open court.
